title: Tangy Mediterranean Chicken with Roasted Rhubarb
description: A flavorful and healthy dish that combines the sweetness of roasted rhubarb with the tanginess of a Mediterranean-inspired chicken tagine.
instructions: Season the chicken breast with the tangy tagine spice blend.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the chicken to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, toss the sliced onion and chopped garlic with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast the onion and garlic in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until caramelized.
Toss the sliced rhubarb with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a separate baking sheet.
Roast the rhubarb in the oven for 15-20 minutes, or until tender.
Serve the chicken with the roasted onion, garlic, and rhubarb, garnished with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
